name: This Afternoon
detailedForecast: Showers and thunderstorms before 2pm, then showers and thunderstorms likely. Mostly cloudy, with a high near 86. Southwest wind around 12 mph, with gusts as high as 23 mph. Chance of precipitation is 80%. New rainfall amounts between a quarter and half of an inch possible.

name: Tonight
shortForecast: Showers And Thunderstorms then Mostly Cloudy
detailedForecast: Showers and thunderstorms before 8pm, then showers and thunderstorms between 8pm and midnight. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 64. West wind 5 to 12 mph, with gusts as high as 24 mph. Chance of precipitation is 90%. New rainfall amounts between a quarter and half of an inch possible.

name: Sunday
detailedForecast: Mostly sunny, with a high near 80. North wind 3 to 7 mph. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

name: Sunday Night
detailedForecast: Mostly clear, with a low around 57. North wind 0 to 6 mph.
